rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban

rules_evaluated.evidence: Body prose maintains Godin warmth + Sutherland reframe + Siilasmaa forward-movement throughout. Opens with philosophical stance (Sutherland), math grounds the claim (Godin concrete + Siilasmaa action), closers name the discipline (Sutherland frame). Agents 101 voice trio intact.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Body prose stays concrete — grounded, fabrication, detection, loop, LLM. All operationally earned within the lecture prose itself.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 39 '**The word is grounded.**' lands hard. Immediately followed by definition + carve-outs (lines 40-45) naming what grounded is NOT (accurate vs. traceable) in Boris-flat register. The slogan survives unhedged.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + strategy docs, NOT in body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Body stays in pedagogical register. No defensive framing against vendor narratives or consulting critique. Positions grounding as a discipline, not as a Bosser differentiator.
Opens with what the student BECOMES ('your agent, left to itself, has no model of truth') rather than what they're missing. The teaching is about capability and craft, not deficit.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 59: '**Source triangulation.**' — term appears with no earned primer. The compendium requires 'one-breath primer tied to what the student just did,' followed by the real word. Currently drops 'triangulation' cold.
rules_evaluated.fix: Expand line 59 slightly: 'Source triangulation — testing whether multiple sources on disk support each claim — catches invention.' Adds the one-breath primer before the formal name.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 61: '**Entailment.**' — same issue, dropped cold. No primer. 'Entailment' is a linguistics term the student hasn't encountered.
rules_evaluated.fix: Expand line 61: 'Entailment — does the briefing claim more than sources support? Overreach is when 'one complaint' becomes 'the market is unhappy' — catches this.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 63: '**Citation integrity.**' — same pattern. Dropped cold. No primer.
rules_evaluated.fix: Expand line 63: 'Citation integrity — when you cite a source, does it actually contain what you claim? A citation that doesn't hold builds false authority.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line 65: '**Counter-evidence search.**' — same issue. Dropped cold.
rules_evaluated.fix: Expand line 65: 'Counter-evidence search — instead of collecting sources that support each claim, hunt for sources that contradict it. One contradiction kills the claim.'

rules_evaluated.evidence: No confusion. 'Memory' and 'context' not used in the lecture.
Lines 13, 15: 'Large language models' (thinking/fabrication). Lines 5, 15, 25, 47: 'agent' (acting/output). Lines 5, 25, 37: 'you ask it' (Claude, addressee). Disciplined split throughout.
No fenced prompt blocks in student-facing body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lecture is a closer beat that primes the exercise; Key Concepts are the exercise's responsibility (per module-file shape). The lecture carries enough theme instances (grounding as discipline, measurement over intuition, compounding math as design pattern) to ground the student's reading. Deferred to exercise body.

No em-dashes in body. Sentences split cleanly — line 5: 'When you ask..., it produces... When you ask..., it still produces... The difference... is invisible... That's the whole problem.' Simple structure throughout.

key_revisions: Rule 3 (check_writing.md): Strip dated session-biography Quality line (line 120) — compendium bans 'caught live' and reopened-audit markers. Let git history carry the draft status.

Rule 2 (check_student_facing.md): Earn four technical terms (source triangulation, entailment, citation integrity, counter-evidence search) with one-breath primers on first use (lines 59, 61, 63, 65).
Rule 1 (check_strategy_tie_in.md): Add mood contract to maintainer block — *unease → empirical confidence* — so lecturer knows the emotional arc.

dropped.rule_lead: No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography.
dropped.evidence: line 120: **Quality:** draft 2026-04-30 (opening PS/PPS added from four-detector pass + rerun on Mata pre-read — re-audit needed)

Maintainer line 86 states: 'After Connections, before the exercise. Primes the empirical-method-selection frame.' Module mood should be documented. Without cross-reference to curriculum/content-strategy.md (which resides in bosser-strategy private space), cannot verify whether the mood contract aligns with Module 3's intended mood arc.
